'''chashozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foam|foam]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foam|foam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chashozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshezheth|chæshezheth]] || [[word:chæshezhej|chæshezhej]] || [[word:chæshezhesh|chæshezhesh]] || [[word:chæshezhe|chæshezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashoshozhoth|chashoshozhoth]] || [[word:chashoshozhoj|chashoshozhoj]] || [[word:chashoshozhosh|chashoshozhosh]] || [[word:chashoshozho|chashoshozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashozhoth|chashozhoth]] || [[word:chashozhoj|chashozhoj]] || [[word:chashozhosh|chashozhosh]] || [[word:chashozho|chashozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashofzhoth|chashofzhoth]] || [[word:chashofzhoj|chashofzhoj]] || [[word:chashofzhosh|chashofzhosh]] || [[word:chashofzhof|chashofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashozhotho|chashozhotho]] || [[word:chashozhojo|chashozhojo]] || [[word:chashozhosho|chashozhosho]] || [[word:chashozhoko|chashozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashozhoth|chashozhoth]] || [[word:chashozhoj|chashozhoj]] || [[word:chashozhosh|chashozhosh]] || [[word:chashozho|chashozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashozhothol|chashozhothol]] || [[word:chashozhojol|chashozhojol]] || [[word:chashozhoshol|chashozhoshol]] || [[word:chashozhokol|chashozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashozhothotho|chashozhothotho]] || [[word:chashozhojojo|chashozhojojo]] || [[word:chashozhoshosho|chashozhoshosho]] || [[word:chashozhoko|chashozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashozhothon|chashozhothon]] || [[word:chashozhojon|chashozhojon]] || [[word:chashozhoshon|chashozhoshon]] || [[word:chashozhokon|chashozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashozhothoro|chashozhothoro]] || [[word:chashozhojoro|chashozhojoro]] || [[word:chashozhoshoro|chashozhoshoro]] || [[word:chashozhokoro|chashozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
